scripts.build:standalone-player: npm run build:standalone-player --workspace frontend && tsx scripts/embed-standalone-player-assets.ts
scripts.dev:standalone-player: concurrently -k -n standalone-build,standalone-embed -c blue,blue "npm run build:standalone-player:watch --workspace frontend" "tsx scripts/embed-standalone-player-assets.ts --watch"
scripts.dev: npm run generate:openui-spec && concurrently -n frontend,backend,standalone -c cyan,magenta,blue "npm run dev --workspace frontend" "npm run dev --workspace backend" "npm run dev:standalone-player"
scripts.build: npm run generate:openui-spec && npm run build:standalone-player && npm run build --workspaces
scripts.lint: npm run lint --workspace @kitto-openui/shared && npm run lint --workspace frontend && npm run lint --workspace backend
scripts.test: npm run test:frontend && npm run test:backend
